description: Single scenario template for Plus content production pipeline.

template.userGoal: Check in at a hotel and ask for basic services politely.
successCriteria: User confirms check-in and check-out dates
User asks one follow-up service question
template.openingLine: Welcome to Sunrise Hotel. May I have your name, please?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to Sunrise Hotel. May I have your name, please?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hi, I have a reservation under Mei Lin.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you, Ms. Lin. You are staying for two nights, correct?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No problem. You can say: I have a reservation under [name].

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Could I also request a wake-up call at 7 a.m.?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Of course. I have added that to your booking.

feedbackRules.trigger: User omits article or subject in reservation sentence.
feedbackRules.coachReplyTemplate: Great start. Try: I have a reservation under Mei Lin.
Nice effort. Stress the first syllable: THURS-day, SAT-ur-day.
Good. Add one detail to sound natural, for example your check-out date.

summary.en: Practice checking in, confirming dates, and asking for one service politely.
summary.zh: 练习酒店入住、确认日期，并礼貌提出一项服务需求。
